task_objective: Create a post-commit build step that packages only required Decky runtime files into SDH-ludusavi.zip.
design_decisions: Write the generated archive to ignored path out/SDH-ludusavi.zip with a top-level SDH-ludusavi/ plugin directory.
Keep the zip allowlist in scripts/package_plugin.py so tests can assert the archive contains required Decky runtime files and nothing else.
Install .git/hooks/post-commit as a local symlink to the tracked scripts/post_commit.sh.
results: Added a post-commit packaging script that rebuilds dist/index.js before creating the zip.
Verified the archive contents contain only LICENSE, Decky manifests, main.py, dist/index.js, first-party backend modules, and vendored pyludusavi runtime files.
